name: lattice
description: Composable AI skills framework covering the full software delivery lifecycle — design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Composable SDLC skills for design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review.
interface.longDescription: Lattice is a composable AI skills framework for the full software delivery lifecycle. Install once to get structured workflows for requirement analysis, design-first thinking, architecture guidance, domain-driven design, clean code, secure coding, test quality, and code review. Skills compose: atoms combine into molecules for complete SDLC workflows.
defaultPrompt: Help me implement from an approved blueprint.
